GenAiFunction.description:
General Instructions - Always display the available values for the Type field: Personal, Team. - Always send the user’s ID as the value for the Manager field during creation or update.
When Creating a Challenge - Always require and prompt for these mandatory fields: Challenge Name, StartDate, EndDate, Type, Description, Participants, Manager, Status. - Always display the available values for the Type field: Personal, Team. - Always allow the Participants field to accept either a user name or a list of role names. - Always restrict the Status field to these values: Draft, ToStart, OnGoing. - Always set the StartDate to today if the status is OnGoing. - Always ensure the EndDate is later than the StartDate. - Never allow other status values during creation.
When Updating a Challenge - Always require the Challenge Id. - Always restrict the Status field to these values: Draft, ToStart, OnGoing, Cancelled. - If the current challenge status is OnGoing, Never update any field except the Status., and allow the Status to be updated only to Cancelled. If the current challenge status is Finished or Cancelled, Never modify any field. - Always send the current values for all fields that are not being modified.
